baseline.note: no legacy ledger — accounting started clean; absorbed 4 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 2 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence; absorbed 1 fill(s) missing from lifecycle persistence

reconciliation.scope_note: lifecycle counts are cumulative since canonical accounting began; baseline counts are legacy ledger totals that predate it; ledger/gate totals == baseline + accounted.

tradingview.note: TradingView alerts are candidate signals only — they cannot place, resize, or bypass trades; the strategy + execution gate remain the sole trade authority.

edge_vs_5min_outcome.note: observe-only: did the TradingView signal at entry predict the 5-min Chainlink outcome (signal_hit_rate vs baseline_up_rate), and did aligning help the bot win (aligned vs opposed bot_win_rate)? Never affects trading.

rsi_trend.note: observe-only: learns P(next 5-min outcome | RSI alert trend state) from the alert history and scores its own next-window predictions. Never trades.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

signal_gate.note: when active, a paper trade is taken only if a fresh TradingView signal agrees with the side; it can only PREVENT trades, never force or bypass them.

context_gate.note: hard prior gate: blocks proven-losing entry contexts (volume spikes, noise regime, far-from-resolution) before enough samples exist for the learned selectivity gate. Can only PREVENT trades — never forces, sizes, or bypasses the execution gate, which remains the sole trade authority.

down_bias_gate.note: restrict-only: harvest DOWN/TV asymmetry by blocking proven-losing UP stacks

mtf_gate.note: observe-only conflict veto: blocks 4m/5m fast-pair conflict only (loop arch default). require_confirm/side_align are opt-in restrict-only layers, not trade authority.

confidence_tier.note: At 15m TTC sweet spot, TV MTF regime adjusts min_edge/max_price only. TV trade gates remain off per operator lock.

learning.note: the bot's own settled-trade experience (calibrated edge model) adjusts the directional probability; it grows as more trades settle. The execution-quality gate, paper-realism, and reconciliation are unchanged and still veto every trade — learning can never bypass them.

last_note.summary: With n=53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG (n=26, WR 0.692), trending regime (n=50, WR 0.64), 120-240s TTC (n=26, WR 0.731), normal BB state (n=16, WR 0.875), bearish_aligned MTF (n=12, WR 0.833), and sell_pressure CVD (n=19, WR 0.737) show confirmed positive EV after costs with n>=8 and WR comfortably above breakeven. UP signals, >=240s holds, active volume, and expansion/squeeze BB states remain negative or marginal. Sample still small overall; most other buckets ignored due to n<8.
warnings: n=53 total remains modest; many sub-buckets still <8 and unreliable
UP direction shows negative realized PnL despite positive avg EV
observe-only mode means no live selectivity yet
focus_next: accumulate more samples in DOWN_STRONG + normal BB + 120-240s TTC intersection
track whether bearish_aligned MTF and sell_pressure CVD retain edge as n grows
monitor degradation in long-hold (>=240s) and active-volume buckets

history.summary: With n=53 total settled trades, overall win-rate 60.4% and positive avg EV after cost (0.116) confirm mild edge, driven almost entirely by DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes. Buckets with n>=8 show confirmed profitability in DOWN direction, bearish-aligned MTF, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, strong ADX, sell-pressure CVD and range-middle; UP signals and >=240s TTC remain negative or marginal. Most other slices have n<8 and are ignored as unreliable.

With n=53 settled trades, overall edge is modestly positive (wr 0.604, ev_after_cost 0.116) but driven by a handful of regimes; DOWN_STRONG, trending/Hurst, normal BB, strong ADX, sell-pressure CVD, bearish MTF alignment, and 120-240s TTC show confirmed positive EV with n>=8 and wr well above breakeven. Most other buckets are either n<8 noise or show flat/negative realized pnl despite positive ev. Sample remains too small for high-confidence live deployment.

With n=53 total settled signals, overall win rate 60.4% and small positive EV after costs, but only a handful of buckets meet n>=8 with win rates confidently above breakeven and positive realized PnL. DOWN_STRONG, trending/Hurst, z-score -2..1, TTC 120-240s, BB normal, volume dead, bearish HTF/aligned, strong ADX, sell-pressure CVD, and range-middle/bottom show confirmed edge; most other slices are noise or under-sampled. No material changes possible as this is the first analysis.

With n=53 total settled trades, DOWN_STRONG signals in trending regimes show confirmed positive EV (wr 0.69, +15.5 pnl) while UP signals remain marginal/negative; strong patterns include ttc 120-240s, bb normal, bearish_aligned mtf, sell_pressure cvd, and zscore -2..1 with n>=13 and positive pnl/ev after costs. Many buckets remain too small or mixed to confirm, with overall edge still modest and sample-limited.

With only 53 settled trades, overall win rate 60.4% and positive avg EV after cost (0.116) but results remain fragile; confirmed edges appear in DOWN_STRONG (n=26, wr=0.692), trending regime (n=50), normal BB state (n=16, wr=0.875), 120-240s TTC (n=26), bearish-aligned MTF (n=12), sell-pressure CVD (n=19) and strong-trend ADX (n=31) where wr comfortably exceeds breakeven and EV>0. Most other buckets are either n<8, show negative realized pnl despite decent wr, or are too close to breakeven to confirm.

With n=53 total settled trades, DOWN_STRONG (n=26, WR=0.692, EV=0.136) and bearish-aligned MTF (n=12, WR=0.833) plus sell-pressure CVD (n=19, WR=0.737) and normal BB state (n=16, WR=0.875) buckets show confirmed positive EV after costs and WR above plausible breakeven; trending/Hurst and 120-240s TTC also hold with n>=20. UP direction and >=240s TTC remain negative or marginal. All other buckets ignored due to n<8.
changes_since_last: first analysis; sample grew to 53 settled trades with DOWN_STRONG and bearish MTF emerging as clearest edges

history.summary: With 53 settled trades overall WR 60.4% and +1.35 USD pnl (+0.116 EV after cost), confirmed profitable patterns (n>=8) center on trending/Hurst, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, strong ADX, sell-pressure CVD, bearish-aligned MTF, and DOWN_STRONG signals; these show WR confidently above breakeven with positive EV. Many other buckets remain below n=8 and are ignored as noise. No prior analysis available so no changes tracked yet.

With n=53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG (n=26, WR 0.692), trending regime (n=50, WR 0.64), 120-240s TTC (n=26, WR 0.731), normal BB state (n=16, WR 0.875), bearish_aligned MTF (n=12, WR 0.833), and sell_pressure CVD (n=19, WR 0.737) show confirmed positive EV after costs with n>=8 and WR comfortably above breakeven. UP signals, >=240s holds, active volume, and expansion/squeeze BB states remain negative or marginal. Sample still small overall; most other buckets ignored due to n<8.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only — never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

aggression.note: loosens (more explore/looser exploit/larger size) as acted trades profit; tightens on losses; circuit breaker is the hard floor.

grok_decider.note: Grok decides; bot executes (paper). shadow=decide+grade only (no trade), follow=engine follows direction/size subject to the deterministic floor (execution realism, risk caps, freshness). Fail-closed -> no_trade.

headlines: Large 1,350 BTC (~$82M) withdrawal from Binance exchange
Bitcoin defending $59K-$60K support amid ongoing ETF outflows
No major macro prints, liquidations or regulatory headlines in last 30min

verifier.note: independent Claude maker-checker; can only veto/shrink a Grok-proposed paper trade, never force one; fail-open; PAPER ONLY.

last_note.summary: With only 5-6 settled trades across fragmented contexts, zero sample-backed edge exists. All contexts show ≤50% win rate or net losses. The 116-trade ledger's 61.2% WR is driven by the baseline 30 trades (legacy data predating current accounting); the 86 new fills contribute minimal PnL and no exploitable signal. No dimension passes profitability thresholds.

knob_recommendations.reason: 202/209 execution rejects due to floor; relax slightly to gather more samples in losing contexts, diagnose systematic mispricing vs. gate miscalibration
Current 5-trade slices are noise; enforce 30-sample minimum before any context claims in confidence_tier_table to avoid spurious patterns
1364 rejects at allowlist stage; tighten to 0.65 to reduce low-conviction chaff, focus pipeline on stronger directional signals for faster learning

new_lessons.rule: Headline 61.2% WR driven by 30 legacy trades; 86 new fills contribute ~$0/trade avg PnL. Report WR separately for legacy vs. new accounting to avoid false confidence.
202/209 execution rejects = 96.7% due to underdog_price_below_floor. Either floor is miscalibrated or true edge lives above it; current gate prevents learning which.
All contexts with n≥4: WR≤50%, net negative PnL. No regime (Hurst/zscore/TTC/edge_quality) shows exploitable directional edge at 5-min horizon in current feature set.
Brier ~0.24, calibration_error 0.076 look OK, but derived from 5-trade buckets. Calibration metrics unreliable until n≥30 per bucket; do not trust current edge_model tuning.
PF=1.08 with avg_loss ($4.67) > avg_win ($3.19) and n=116 (30 legacy + 86 new) indicates survival bias or legacy cohort luck, not repeatable alpha. Require PF≥1.5 + loss<win to claim edge.

research_loop.note: strategy-layer research meta-loop: independent model proposes exploit/avoid contexts + bounded knob nudges + lessons. Observe-only unless auto_apply (whitelisted+bounded). PAPER ONLY.

recent.rule: 93 DOWN vs 20 UP (4.65:1) with DOWN 63.4% WR vs UP 50% WR signals directional bias, not market-neutral edge—reject if UP trade count <30% of total
All context buckets n≤2 with 0% WR are pure noise—never trade contexts with <20 settled trades regardless of apparent WR
Profit factor 1.06 with avg_loss > avg_win is statistically indistinguishable from breakeven after any cost drift—require avg_win ≥ 1.5× avg_loss
202/209 exec rejects at underdog floor suggests floor is primary filter, not feature model—if >90% rejects at one gate, the gate IS the strategy
62% of execution candidates rejected for price_below_floor suggests floor is miscalibrated or true edge requires lower-priced bets
Every measured context slice (6/6) lost money; no context-conditional edge detected—may indicate model has no predictive power
Avg loss 47% larger than avg win while WR=61% yields PF=1.06; need WR>68% or cut losses 30% to sustain edge
Headline 61.2% WR driven by 30 legacy trades; 86 new fills contribute ~$0/trade avg PnL. Report WR separately for legacy vs. new accounting to avoid false confidence.
202/209 execution rejects = 96.7% due to underdog_price_below_floor. Either floor is miscalibrated or true edge lives above it; current gate prevents learning which.
All contexts with n≥4: WR≤50%, net negative PnL. No regime (Hurst/zscore/TTC/edge_quality) shows exploitable directional edge at 5-min horizon in current feature set.
Brier ~0.24, calibration_error 0.076 look OK, but derived from 5-trade buckets. Calibration metrics unreliable until n≥30 per bucket; do not trust current edge_model tuning.
PF=1.08 with avg_loss ($4.67) > avg_win ($3.19) and n=116 (30 legacy + 86 new) indicates survival bias or legacy cohort luck, not repeatable alpha. Require PF≥1.5 + loss<win to claim edge.

loops.note: formalized sub-loops (data/signal/verify/execute/risk/research/news/lessons); each has a trigger + skill + verifier + verifiable stop + a liveness watchdog (last_beat_age_s/stalled). PAPER ONLY.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

arbitrage.note: risk-free dutch book: BUY-both (asks<$1) + SELL-both (mint $1 set, sell bids>$1); deterministic P&L; NEVER blended into directional. PAPER ONLY.

last_violations.description: 15m up-mid below nested 5m up-mid: P(up_15m) cannot be < P(up_5m) for overlapping window

dependency_arbitrage.note: LCMM nested-window scanner + optional paper execution on validated nested_implication violations.

arb_graph.note: Graph is rebuilt each tick from open windows; Grok edges are never tradable alone.

baseline_cohort_gate.note: baseline quant path: 180-240s TTC band (scaled on 15m), high edge + strong CEX; UP blocked until promoted; green_path=15m DOWN cohort only (TV observe-only)

learned_selectivity_gate.note: rejects ONLY buckets confidently below their own breakeven win-rate (Wilson upper bound < breakeven AND net-negative PnL); coin-flip / not-significant buckets are NOT rejected. Can only make the bot MORE selective — never trades, resizes, or bypasses the execution gate. Exploration tracked separately.

bucket_evidence.rule: blocked iff confidently_losing AND fdr_significant (Wilson upper < breakeven, PF < min, BH-FDR q=0.10)

counterfactual.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

gate.note: when enabled, only late-window AND high-conviction setups may trade; can only PREVENT trades, never force/size/bypass the execution gate.

edge_measurement.note: observe-only: grades whether late-window high-conviction trades win more (cohort vs other) from live settled trades; never affects trading.

arbitrage.note: arb halt only on anomaly (guaranteed_profit<=0); risk-free P&L is segregated

dependency_arbitrage.note: Lane B halt on booking anomaly only; walk-forward is observability

stop_conditions.note: quantitative kill switches checked each tick from settled ledger evidence; NOT the LLM's opinion. Halting blocks NEW entries only.

execution_realistic_edge.note: KL divergence is observe-only — large KL means model disagrees with market; never a buy signal when model Brier > market Brier.

arbitrage.note: risk-free dutch book: BUY-both (asks<$1) + SELL-both (mint $1 set, sell bids>$1); deterministic P&L; NEVER blended into directional. PAPER ONLY.

selectivity_impact.note: in-sample replay using final accumulated bucket evidence (diagnostic estimate)

history.summary: With 53 settled trades overall WR 60.4% and +1.35 USD pnl (+0.116 EV after cost), confirmed profitable patterns (n>=8) center on trending/Hurst, normal BB state, 120-240s TTC, strong ADX, sell-pressure CVD, bearish-aligned MTF, and DOWN_STRONG signals; these show WR confidently above breakeven with positive EV. Many other buckets remain below n=8 and are ignored as noise. No prior analysis available so no changes tracked yet.

With n=53 settled trades, DOWN_STRONG (n=26, WR 0.692), trending regime (n=50, WR 0.64), 120-240s TTC (n=26, WR 0.731), normal BB state (n=16, WR 0.875), bearish_aligned MTF (n=12, WR 0.833), and sell_pressure CVD (n=19, WR 0.737) show confirmed positive EV after costs with n>=8 and WR comfortably above breakeven. UP signals, >=240s holds, active volume, and expansion/squeeze BB states remain negative or marginal. Sample still small overall; most other buckets ignored due to n<8.

analyst_A.note: observe-only Grok research analyst that LEARNS the bot's trading patterns from its growing settled-trade/selectivity/late-window evidence and refines across cycles (continuity). Diagnostics only — never trades.

predictor_B.note: observe-only Grok P(up) per signal; graded vs realized BTC move before it could ever be trusted; never places/sizes/bypasses a trade.

grok_signal_intel.note: A analyzes signal-learning performance; B predicts P(up) per signal and is graded vs realized moves. Both observe-only — never place/size/bypass a trade; the execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

cex_lead_edge.promotion_rule: n>=min AND wilson_lower(win_rate)>breakeven AND Brier_cex<Brier_market AND avg_pnl>0
cex_lead_edge.note: CEX-lead latency edge; benchmark is the MARKET price (already ~0.21 Brier). SHADOW grades only; GATED can PROPOSE a side on a proven bucket but the execution-quality gate + safety floor remain authoritative. PAPER ONLY.

promotion.note: observe-only diagnostic; eligible buckets are NOT auto-promoted to trading authority unless promotion_allowed_by_config is true AND explicitly wired. The execution gate remains the sole trade authority.

trading_performance.note: Profitability, win-rate, side balance (DOWN>UP), and ledger integrity.

operation.note: Engine health: reconciliation, loops, stops, and pipeline activity.

external_signals.note: External signal quality and how well signals align with bot outcomes.
